message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant backend
participant MySQL

User -> backend : seenNotification(Notification_id, token)
backend -> backend : confirm JWT token

alt [(token is invalid)]
    backend -> User : Unauthorized
else [(token is valid)]
    backend -> MySQL : clearUnreadNotification (Notification_id)
    MySQL -> backend : OK
    backend -> User : OK
end
@enduml
